title: CommandNotFoundError should list available commands in sorted order
body:
CommandNotFoundError in radicli/util.py stores the available command names and displays them in the error message, but the options list is not sorted. The order depends on dict insertion order, making error messages non-deterministic across Python versions.



Fix: sort the options list in CommandNotFoundError.__init__ before storing.
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py verifying the options appear sorted.
